overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2x Long FCX Daily ETF (FCXG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (NYSE: FCX) stock, less fees, and expenses FCXG was launched on Feb 19, 2026 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
